prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年河南省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为约716名、895名、738名、684名、857名，整体波动较大，近5年呈现\"升-降-升\"的震荡格局，无明显单边                         趋势；2025年基准位次约857名，较2024年（684名）后移约173名，为近5年次高位；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划2021–2024年稳定为91人，2025年增至94                        人（小幅扩招3.3%）；2026年计划大幅增至122人，较2025年扩招约29.8%，显著增加招生名额，对竞争压力有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国科学技术大学为985工                         程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定位列全国第7名，属于顶尖高校层次，对高分考生具有极强吸引力；2025年高考周期声誉评                         价偏正面（李政道先生逝世引发对少年班贡献的关注）；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（涉及教授贪污助学生入读硕士被判刑事件），但整体舆情关注度有限；抖音热度排名全                        国第12位（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；第五轮学科评估中拥有19个A-及以上学科，其中数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、                        生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程等8个学科获评A+，理学基础学科实力全国顶尖，与该校理工类招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电                        气工程等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与中科大优势学科方向吻合；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万（较2025年大幅增长），按2025年物理类占比61.2%估算，2026年物理类                        考生约73.4万人，较2025年（55.5万）增长约32%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；2026年；学校位于安徽省合肥市，非本省高校，                         无本地招生倾斜；河南省为高考大省，考生基数大，顶尖高校竞争尤为激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次857名、2026年大幅扩招约29.8%（缓解竞争）、河南省物理类                        考生增长约32%（加剧竞争）以及学校极高层次与高热度的综合影响，扩招与考生增长效应大致对冲，但学校顶尖地位和抖音高热仍维持较强吸引力；预测2026年最低录取位次约9                        80名，区间868–1092名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）（数学类/物理学类等）
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划英才班）（人工智能/计算机类/电子信息类）
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划英才班）（力学类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类
- 计算机类
- 电子信息类（集成电路方向/信息科技方向）
- 量子信息科学（未来技术学院）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 物理学类
- 化学类
- 生物科学类
- 空间科学与技术
- 网络空间安全
- 理科试验班类（统计与大数据技术试验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约980名（区间868–1092名），建议位次在区间下限868名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档拔尖计划英才班及王牌专业；位次在980名左右的考生以二档专业为主、一档专业为                        辅；位次在区间上限1092名附近的考生以三档专业保底为主，兼顾二档中位次要求较低的专业。中科大专业设置以试验班大类招生为主，入校后有机会通过分流进入心仪方向，报                        考时可充分利用大类招生的灵活性。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science/physics category in Henan Province were approximately 716, 895, 738, 684, and 857 respectively, showing significant fluctuations and an 'up-down-up' oscillating pattern over the past five years without a clear unilateral trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 857, which is approximately 173 places lower than 2024 (684), marking the second highest in the past five years; the enrollment plan for science/physics category in Henan Province was stable at 91 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 94 in 2025 (a slight expansion of 3.3%); the 2026 plan significantly increases to 122 students, an expansion of about 29.8% compared to 2025, notably increasing admission slots, which helps alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranking 7th nationally in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top-tier university level, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive (the death of Tsung-Dao Lee drew attention to the contributions of the Special Class for the Gifted Young); the reputation evaluation during the 2026 cycle is slightly negative (involving a professor's corruption case helping students gain admission to master's programs), but overall public attention is limited; Douyin popularity ranks 12th nationally (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high application interest; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including 8 disciplines rated A+ (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering), with top-tier strength in basic science disciplines, highly matching the university's science and engineering admissions majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, aligning with USTC's advantageous disciplines; the total number of general college entrance examination takers in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from 2025), and based on the 2025 physics category proportion of 61.2%, it is estimated that there will be about 734,000 physics category examinees in 2026, an increase of about 32% from 2025 (555,000), with the expansion of examinees intensifying overall competition; the university is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university, so there is no local admission preference; Henan Province is a major college entrance examination province with a large candidate base, making competition for top universities particularly fierce.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 857, the significant enrollment expansion of about 29.8% in 2026 (alleviating competition), the increase in physics category examinees in Henan by about 32% (intensifying competition), and the university's extremely high level and high popularity, the effects of expansion and examinee growth roughly offset each other, but the university's top-tier status and high Douyin popularity still maintain strong appeal; the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 980, with a range of 868–1092.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Program Science and Technology Elite Class) (Mathematics/Physics, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Talent Program Elite Class) (Artificial Intelligence/Computer Science/Electronic Information)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Talent Program Elite Class) (Mechanics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics
- Computer Science
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Direction/Information Technology Direction)
- Quantum Information Science (School of Future Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Physics
- Chemistry
- Biological Sciences
- Space Science and Technology
- Cyberspace Security
- Science Experimental Class (Statistics and Big Data Technology Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 980 (range 868–1092). Candidates with rankings within the lower bound of 868 or below are advised to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Top Talent Program Elite Classes and flagship majors; candidates around ranking 980 should prioritize Tier 2 majors supplemented by Tier 1 majors; candidates near the upper bound of 1092 should mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. USTC's major settings are mainly based on experimental class large-category enrollment, and students have opportunities to enter desired directions through分流 after enrollment. When applying, candidates can fully utilize the flexibility of large-category enrollment.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
